message: Remove purpose column from runner table

files.patch:
@@ -124,11 +124,11 @@ uvx tenzir-test --root tests --update
 
 ## Runners
 
-| Runner   | Command/behaviour                      | Input extension | Artifact | Purpose                                     |
-| -------- | -------------------------------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------- |
-| `tenzir` | `tenzir -f <test>`                     | `.tql`          | `.txt`   | Evaluate pipelines and capture stdout.      |
-| `python` | Execute with the active Python runtime | `.py`           | `.txt`   | Run Python-based tests that emit baselines. |
-| `custom` | `sh -eu <test>` via the harness helper | `.sh`           | varies   | Drive shell-based scenarios with fixtures.  |
+| Runner   | Command/behaviour                      | Input extension | Artifact |
+| -------- | -------------------------------------- | --------------- | -------- |
+| `tenzir` | `tenzir -f <test>`                     | `.tql`          | `.txt`   |
+| `python` | Execute with the active Python runtime | `.py`           | `.txt`   |
+| `custom` | `sh -eu <test>` via the harness helper | `.sh`           | varies   |
